p_value_note: rank-based p-value from N_SHUFFLES permutations is bounded below by 1/N_SHUFFLES; 0/N_SHUFFLES is reported as a bound, not an exact 0.
comparison_std_only_p_note: recomputed at the [10,15]s/15s config (window_horizon_sweep.py found [15,30]s/30s unsafe for every class's tightest real gap, 2026-07-13). Prior values (raw=0.968, std_only_f1=0.778, std_only_p=0.05) were correct for the superseded [15,30]s/30s config -- superseded, not wrong at the time.
config_note: [10,15]s horizons / 15s window -- the new official config as of 2026-07-13. Delta-feature F1/p are UNCHANGED from the superseded [15,30]s/30s config (0.941/p<0.01 both times); std-only ablation is NOT stable across configs (0.778/p=0.05 at [15,30]s/30s vs 0.316/p=0.68 here) -- smaller windows leave std with too few samples to be informative on its own, but the delta-feature result does not depend on std alone and is robust.
